evals.prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for a Node.js project that runs tests on every PR and deploys to staging automatically when merged to main.
evals.expected_output: The agent provides GitHub Actions YAML with trigger on push/PR, node matrix strategy, caching for npm dependencies, test job with coverage, staging deployment job with environment protection, and proper job dependencies (needs: test).
assertions: The agent uses actions/setup-node with version matrix
The agent includes npm ci caching strategy
The agent runs tests on PR trigger
The agent deploys to staging on main merge
The agent uses 'needs' for job dependencies

evals.prompt: Design a blue-green deployment pipeline for a Kubernetes application with automatic rollback on health check failure.
evals.expected_output: The agent provides pipeline with blue-green service configuration, health check implementation, traffic switching mechanism, automatic rollback trigger on failure detection, and monitoring/notifications.
assertions: The agent describes blue-green deployment strategy
The agent includes health check verification
The agent has traffic switching mechanism
The agent implements automatic rollback
The agent includes post-deployment monitoring

evals.prompt: Set up security scanning in our CI pipeline to detect vulnerabilities in dependencies and secrets in code before deployment.
evals.expected_output: The agent suggests Trivy for dependency scanning, GitLeaks for secrets detection, SAST with SonarQube/CodeQL, integrates all into CI workflow with SARIF output for GitHub Security tab, and sets up failure criteria.
assertions: The agent mentions Trivy or similar dependency scanner
The agent includes secrets detection (GitLeaks/truffleHog)
The agent suggests SAST integration
The agent uses SARIF format for GitHub integration
The agent configures scan failure thresholds

evals.prompt: Optimize our slow CI pipeline that takes 45 minutes. It runs all tests sequentially and rebuilds Docker images every time.
evals.expected_output: The agent suggests job parallelization and matrix splitting, recommends Docker layer caching with buildx, suggests test categorization (fast/slow split), proposes caching for dependencies and build artifacts, recommends conditional job execution.
assertions: The agent suggests parallel job execution
The agent recommends Docker layer caching
The agent proposes test splitting strategies
The agent mentions artifact caching
The agent includes conditional job skipping

evals.prompt: Create a multi-environment promotion workflow for dev -> staging -> production with required approvals for production.
evals.expected_output: The agent provides GitHub Actions workflow with environment-specific jobs, environment protection rules for production approval, promotion logic between environments, rollback capability, and deployment verification steps.
assertions: The agent defines dev/staging/prod job progression
The agent uses GitHub environment protection
The agent requires manual approval for production
The agent includes promotion gates between stages
The agent provides rollback procedures
